name: Forgotten Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (165 C).
2. Beat egg whites with the salt until foamy.
3. Slowly add sugar, one tablespoonful at a time, beating after each addition until the meringue stands in stiff peaks.
4. Stir in vanilla and fold in chocolate chips.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a lined baking sheet.
6. Place the sheet in the preheated oven.
7. After 2 minutes, turn off the oven.
8. Leave the meringues in the oven overnight.
9. Remove from the pan and store in a cookie tin lined with paper towel.
Makes 3 dozen. From The Gazette 90/12/19.
